videos.headline: Texas A&M upsets Florida with FG as time expires
videos.description: After trailing for the majority of the game, Seth Small wins it for Texas A&M with a 26-yard field goal as time expires.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas A&M upsets Florida with FG as time expires) 2020/10/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trask and Pitts connect for a Gators TD
videos.description: Kyle Trask finds a double-covered Kyle Pitts for the 5-yard touchdown pass, putting Florida on the board first.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trask and Pitts connect for a Gators TD) 2020/10/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Toney stays in bounds for the TD catch
videos.description: Kyle Trask hits Kadarius Toney just before he steps out of bounds for the the 11-yard touchdown reception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Toney stays in bounds for the TD catch) 2020/10/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chapman reels in the 2-yard TD for Texas A&M
videos.description: Kellen Mond drops back to dish out the quick pass to Caleb Chapman who holds on for the short touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chapman reels in the 2-yard TD for Texas A&M) 2020/10/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trask throws 37-yard TD strike to Toney
videos.description: Kyle Trask launches it 37 yards to Kadarius Toney to extend the Gators' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trask throws 37-yard TD strike to Toney) 2020/10/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas A&M's Brown hurts himself celebrating sack
videos.description: Bobby Brown III goes down with an injury while celebrating a sack on Kyle Trask.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas A&M's Brown hurts himself celebrating sack) 2020/10/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wydermyer stretches out for the one-handed grab
videos.description: Kellen Mond throws a bullet to Jalen Wydermyer, who hauls in the one-hander and gets the first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wydermyer stretches out for the one-hand grab) 2020/10/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Spiller bounces off a defender and breaks loose to give A&M the lead
videos.description: Isaiah Spiller breaks tackles to get open for the 19-yard go-ahead touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Spiller break loose for the A&M lead) 2020/10/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chapman's 51-yard TD catch draws Aggies even
videos.description: Kellen Mond launches the deep ball and Caleb Chapman pulls it down and scores again for Texas A&M.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chapman's 51-yard TD catch draws Aggies even) 2020/10/10 ESHEET

videos.description: Florida vs. Texas A&M is briefly interrupted by a moth landing on the SkyCam's camera lens.
